Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex

Class ExcelLedgerRow

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex.ExcelLedgerRow
public class ExcelLedgerRow extends Object
Represents a single row from an imported Excel ledger. The row contains general transaction info and up to four allocation groups consisting of amount and account details.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ExcelLedgerRow.Allocation
    Represents one amount allocation within a row.
